title: Get Email From Email Gateway - Proofpoint Protection Server
content:
This playbook retrieves a specified EML/MSG file directly from the Proofpoint Protection Server.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (ProofpointServerProtection, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — MessageID: The Proofpoint message GUID..

Integrations/scripts used: proofpoint-pps-quarantine-message-download.
